meaning: n.航路,[空]水上飞机升降用的水面跑道
examples: You must stay clear of fairway.
Green is 20 feet above the fairway and almost 50 yards deep so be careful on club selection!
The green is slightly elevated above fairway level and is only 15 yards deep, distance control is a must.
Garcia made par from deep in the woods and bogey from the middle of the fairway.
The greens seemed pretty receptive, too, so if you were in the fairway you could attack.
